description: You are a backend developer setting up a local development environment for an existing web application at /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/webapp/. Create a docker-compose.override.yml file in the project directory that applies development configurations without modifying the original docker-compose.yml. The API service must be configured with environment variables FLASK_DEBUG=1 and FLASK_ENV=development, a bind mount from ./api to /app, the command 'flask run --host=0.0.0.0 --port=5000 --reload', and a port mapping of 5678:5678. The DB service must be configured to map host port 5432 to container port 5432. Ensure the application is running with the web, api, and db services active under this new configuration.
